text.message: Waddup black lol hopefully no throwers this game,.,that dude was absurd
Already plowing me, had to rob me too?
We would never. You’re my homie
Plowing happens but to rob me too on first turn just eff off
2 spots, army, could even snipe road
The more you try propaganda the more ur getting robbed
if these were vps you would have won already
Ya so they have a mono
Why would you mono ore to trade bank for two wheat and do nothing?
take road now blue so black is happy
Trying to but red won’t trade me a brick so prob good game for you
as long as it isn't to plow
No as much as I needed that settle spot I just needed to take road from orange
next orbit red takes army black so you can be happy
Why didn’t you just settle orange it makes no sense
